title: Cinder Mirage Lane
text: A false safe road overlays the real path, offering speed for anyone willing to trust heat haze.
flavor: It is easiest to follow when you are already lost.
resolutionSummary: Mapped the mirage lane and marked a risky shortcut.

resolveEffect.text: Cinder Mirage Lane mapped: a high-risk shortcut is available to bargain with.
